landing.heroDescription: Beautiful, elegant, and effortless. Fill in your details, choose a style, and share with your guests. No design skills needed.
landing.howItWorksSubtitle: Three simple steps to your perfect wedding website
landing.step1Desc: Enter your names, wedding date, and venue. It takes less than a minute.
landing.step2Desc: Pick a template and color palette that matches your wedding aesthetic.
landing.step3Desc: Get a beautiful link and QR code to share with your guests instantly.
landing.chooseStyleSubtitle: Elegant templates designed for every couple
landing.everythingYouNeedSubtitle: All the features to make your wedding website perfect
landing.featureQrDesc: Share your wedding website with a beautiful QR code for your invitations.
landing.featureRsvpDesc: Collect RSVPs, menu choices, and dietary requirements in one place.
landing.featurePhotoDesc: Showcase your engagement photos and share memories with guests.
landing.featureCountdownDesc: Build excitement with a live countdown to your special day.
landing.featureProgramDesc: Share the schedule so guests know exactly what to expect.
landing.featureDomainDesc: Your wedding site lives at a beautiful, shareable URL.
landing.simplePricingSubtitle: Preview for free, publish when you're ready
landing.noSubscriptions: No subscriptions. No hidden fees. Yours forever.
landing.pricingFeature1: Custom wedding website with your chosen template
landing.pricingFeature7: Active for 1 year after your wedding

create.namesDateSubtitle: Tell us about your big day
create.emailHelp: For RSVP notifications and managing your website

create.yourContentSubtitle: Add details your guests will love (all optional)
create.yourStoryPlaceholder: How did you meet? Share your love story...
create.noProgramEntries: No entries yet. Click "Add Entry" to build your program.
create.previewPublishSubtitle: Your wedding website is ready! Scroll through the preview below.
create.websiteLanguageHelp: The language your guests will see on your wedding website
